# CWE-1240 vulnerable: homegrown XOR cipher
lang: go
file: CWE-1240-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1240: Use of a Cryptographic Primitive with a Risky Implementation.
// Vulnerable: custom XOR stream cipher protects session tokens.

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func xorCipher(key byte, data []byte) []byte {
	out := make([]byte, len(data))
	for i, b := range data {
		out[i] = b ^ key
	}
	return out
}

func SealSessionToken() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		token := c.PostForm("token")
		sealed := xorCipher(0x5A, []byte(token))
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"sealed": string(sealed)})
	}
}
